assignments.name: Update_Pay_Transaction_Exclude_from_Invoicing
assignments.label: Update Pay Transaction - Exclude from Invoicing

assignments.name: Update_Pay_Transaction_Exclude_from_PB
assignments.label: Update Pay Transaction - Exclude from PB

decisions.description: Provides additional updates based upon the Pay Transaction relationship to other processes.
decisions.name: Additional_Types
decisions.label: Additional Types

rules.name: Timesheet_Item_or_Timesheet_Activity_is_not_null
rules.label: Timesheet Item or Timesheet Activity is not null

Flow.description: ALN-21 - Created to do FF actions on Pay Transactions ALN-47 - frmInvoiceGroupById - new group-by values ALN-222 - Added Invoice Group by for non TS ALN-272 - Stamp Branch ID from Assignment on PTIX ALN-186 - Update invoice rate & pay rate formulas ALN-371 - Ensuring flow of Purchase Order numbers onto TS entries for splitting of invoices ALN-374 - Invoice Group By fix for Allowance ALN-401: Enable bypassing of T2P Override ALN-426: Remove decision element for 'Is PO Number Null' ALN-439: Update trigger to on-create only. Update the frmSiteID to have 3rd criteria and reference SiteID on PTIX record. Also cater for re-trigger via checkbox. ALN-456: Remove the outdated default outcome on TSE/TSI Pay Transactions that does not reference WFM Contracts. ALN-507: Cater for reversal transactions and getting correct invoice group by. Also added WFM Contract ALN-514 - Cater for cancellation pay/charge option (Cancellation Option from Shift) on Allowances ALN-515 - Cater for Invoice Group by Employee ALN-532 - Updated to cater for update of Invoice Entity on PTIX from Contract.DefaultInvoiceEntity ALN-546 - Updated frmWFMContract formula to add WFM_Contract__c as third fallback to align Payment and Allowance Group By ID generation ALN-512 - 'Exclude from Pay Batch' logic to no longer exclude Pay Transactions where Pay Rate = 0 if 'QTY Converted to TOIL' is not null. ALN-480 Added additional decision outcome to cater for missing Inv calendar period and Inv group by ID Added Record type filter for Calendar to be Invoice

formulas.name: ff_assignment_GroupBy
formulas.expression: CASE( TEXT({!get_Assignment.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__r.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Account", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract & Site", {!get_Assignment.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__c} & "_" & {!$Record.WFM_Site_ID__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract", {!get_Assignment.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site & Employee", {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Employee__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site", {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Branch", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Branch__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Job Type", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Shift", {!$Record.Shift__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Classification", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_et__Award_Classification__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Level", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_et__Award_Level__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "PO Number", {!$Record.tc9_et__Purchase_Order_Number__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Employee", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Employee__c}, "" )

formulas.name: frmInvoiceGroupByID
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!Get_Contract.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}))), CASE( TEXT({!Get_Contract.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Account", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract & Site", {!frmWFMContract} & "_" & {!$Record.WFM_Site_ID__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract", {!frmWFMContract} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site & Employee", {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Employee__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site", {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Branch", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Branch__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Job Type", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Shift", {!$Record.Shift__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Classification", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_et__Award_Classification__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Level", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_et__Award_Level__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "PO Number", {!Get_Timesheet_Entry.Purchase_Order_Number__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Employee", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Employee__c}, "" ), {!var_original_group_by} )

formulas.name: frmInvoiceGroupByID_Allowance
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!Get_Contract_from_Pay_Transaction.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}))), CASE( TEXT({!Get_Contract_from_Pay_Transaction.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Account", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract & Site", {!frmWFMContract} & "_" & {!$Record.WFM_Site_ID__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract", {!frmWFMContract} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site & Employee", {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Employee__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site", {!frmSiteID} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Branch", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Branch__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Job Type", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Shift", {!$Record.Shift__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Classification", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_et__Award_Classification__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Level", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.tc9_et__Award_Level__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "PO Number", {!$Record.tc9_et__Purchase_Order_Number__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Employee", {!$Record.tc9_pr__Client__c} & "_" & {!$Record.tc9_pr__Employee__c}, "" ), {!ff_assignment_GroupBy} )

formulas.name: frmWFMContract

Flow.label: Pay Transaction on Create

recordLookups.name: Get_Pay_Transaction_Allowance_Record_Type
recordLookups.label: Get Pay Transaction Allowance Record Type
